Name: FAnimControlTrackKey
Description: Structure used for holding information for one animation played on the Anim Control track.

Variables.Name: StartTime
Variables.Description: Position in the Matinee sequence to start playing this animation.

Variables.Name: AnimStartOffset
Variables.Description: Time to start playing AnimSequence at.

Variables.Name: AnimEndOffset
Variables.Description: Time to end playing the AnimSequence at.

Variables.Name: bReverse
Variables.Description: Whether to play the animation in reverse or not.
